name: Splunk Enterprise Security MCP Tools
description: Read-only MCP tools for Splunk Enterprise Security readiness and content validation.
author: splunk-enterprise-security-config skill

tools.name: es_app_health
tools.title: Enterprise Security App Health
tools.description: Show Enterprise Security app installation, visibility, configured state, and version.
tools.spl: | rest /services/apps/local count=0 | search title=SplunkEnterpriseSecuritySuite OR title=MissionControl OR title=SA-ThreatIntelligence OR title=DA-ESS-ContentUpdate OR title=SA-ContentLibrary | table title label version disabled visible configured state | sort title

tools.name: es_required_indexes
tools.title: Enterprise Security Required Indexes
tools.description: Check presence and basic settings for common ES, Mission Control, risk, notable, and threat indexes.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/indexes count=0 | search title=notable OR title=risk OR title=threat_activity OR title=threat_intel OR title=mc_notable OR title=mc_inv OR title=mc_artefacts OR title=mc_action_run OR title=mc_audit | table title disabled datatype totalEventCount currentDBSizeMB maxTotalDataSizeMB frozenTimePeriodInSecs splunk_server | sort title

tools.name: es_kvstore_status
tools.title: Enterprise Security KV Store Status
tools.description: Report platform KV Store status for Enterprise Security readiness.
tools.spl: | rest /services/server/info | table serverName kvStoreStatus kvStoreVersion version
examples: Check KV Store status for ES

tools.name: es_kv_collections
tools.title: Enterprise Security KV Collections
tools.description: List ES-owned asset, identity, threat, and notable KV Store collection definitions visible through REST.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/storage/collections/config count=0 | search eai:acl.app=SplunkEnterpriseSecuritySuite OR eai:acl.app=SA-IdentityManagement OR eai:acl.app=SA-ThreatIntelligence OR title=asset_* OR title=identity_* OR title=threat_* OR title=notable* | table title eai:acl.app accelerated_fields replicate enforceTypes | sort eai:acl.app title

tools.name: es_data_model_acceleration
tools.title: Enterprise Security Data Model Acceleration
tools.description: Inventory CIM and ES data model acceleration settings.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/datamodel/model count=0 | search eai:acl.app=CIM OR eai:acl.app=SplunkEnterpriseSecuritySuite OR eai:acl.app=SA-* OR eai:acl.app=DA-ESS-* | table title eai:acl.app acceleration.enabled acceleration.earliest_time acceleration.cron_schedule acceleration.max_time | sort eai:acl.app title

tools.name: es_notable_risk_threat_data
tools.title: Enterprise Security Notable Risk Threat Data
tools.description: Summarize recent notable, risk, and threat activity data by index and sourcetype.
tools.spl: | tstats count latest(_time) as latest where index=notable OR index=risk OR index=threat_activity OR index=threat_intel by index sourcetype | eval latest=strftime(latest,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | sort -count
examples: Summarize recent ES notable risk and threat data

tools.name: es_urgency_matrix
tools.title: Enterprise Security Urgency Matrix
tools.description: Read ES urgency matrix stanzas from urgency.conf.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/SplunkEnterpriseSecuritySuite/configs/conf-urgency count=0 | table title severity priority urgency eai:acl.app | sort title

tools.name: es_notable_suppressions
tools.title: Enterprise Security Notable Suppressions
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/SplunkEnterpriseSecuritySuite/configs/conf-notable_suppressions count=0 | table title disabled description search earliest_time latest_time eai:acl.owner | sort title

tools.name: es_correlation_search_inventory
tools.title: Enterprise Security Correlation Search Inventory
tools.description: List ES correlation, notable, risk, and finding search definitions visible as saved searches.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/saved/searches count=0 | search eai:acl.app=SplunkEnterpriseSecuritySuite OR eai:acl.app=DA-ESS-* OR action.notable=1 OR action.risk=1 OR action.correlationsearch.enabled=1 | table title eai:acl.app disabled is_scheduled cron_schedule action.notable action.risk action.correlationsearch.enabled | sort eai:acl.app title

tools.name: es_glass_tables_views
tools.title: Enterprise Security Glass Tables And Views
tools.description: List ES dashboards, Glass Tables, and app views.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/data/ui/views count=0 | search eai:acl.app=SplunkEnterpriseSecuritySuite OR eai:acl.app=SA-* OR eai:acl.app=DA-ESS-* | table title label eai:acl.app isDashboard version updated | sort eai:acl.app title
examples: List ES dashboards and glass tables

tools.name: es_content_library_state
tools.title: Enterprise Security Content Library State
tools.description: Check ES content-library and ESCU-related app state without invoking external content APIs.
tools.spl: | rest /services/apps/local count=0 | search title=DA-ESS-ContentUpdate OR title=SA-ContentLibrary OR title=Splunk_Security_Essentials OR title=SplunkEnterpriseSecuritySuite | table title label version disabled visible configured | sort title
